commits.subject: Flattening stratification for a relative curve: ofCurve closed by instantiating the main theorem at pr_T (properness by base change)
QuotScheme: relocate Lane F affine-section chain below the union-merge substrate (order-safe, verbatim) so Stacks 01I8 machinery is available to it

Stacks 01I8 Step-1 pin closed: pullback of a quasi-coherent sheaf along fromSpec is tilde of its V-sections, with the Sigma-pair unit identity (bijectivity of the base map via unit_leftAdjointUniq + restriction-unit components; iso via the now-live tilde-Gamma counit). QuotScheme sorries 12 -> 11
Blueprint: complete proof for lem:tildeIso_of_isQuasicoherent_isAffineOpen (Stacks 01I8 Step-1 pin) matching the landed Lean proof; mark proof leanok
Ground reconcile 0010 T12: recommendation for next session (01I8 pin closed; next targets pushforward_isQuasicoherent / N1 baseMap; I-0087 blueprint port)

qcqs section localization (Stacks 01P0 beyond affine): Γ(M,W)→Γ(M,D(g)) is localization at powers g for quasi-coherent M on quasi-compact quasi-separated W, by Mayer–Vietoris induction on compact opens over the affine gap2 keystone

pushforward preserves quasi-coherence (Stacks 01XJ), axiom-clean: qcqs section localization feeds a converse fromTildeΓ transport at each affine of the base; closes the Lane F pushforward_isQuasicoherent pin (QuotScheme sorries 11→10)

blueprint: qcqs section localization (Stacks 01P0) + converse tilde-Gamma transport nodes; pushforward_isQuasicoherent (01XJ) proof rewritten to the real argument and marked proved; repairs the dangling lem:qcoh_section_localization_basicOpen ref

blueprint(01XJ): fix lem:pushforward_isQuasicoherent header — correct \lean pointer to AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.pushforward_isQuasicoherent (was a non-existent constant) and place the [title] as the lemma optional arg so it no longer renders as body; DAG now matches the axiom-clean Lean decl
roadmap(AJC.picrep): log Stacks 01XJ closure (pushforward_isQuasicoherent axiom-clean, QuotScheme sorries 11->10)

Stacks 01HQ closed: pullback of tilde is tilde of base change, axiom-clean. Adjoint-uniqueness route: tilde-Gamma adjunction composed with pullback-pushforward vs extend-restrict scalars composed with tilde-Gamma, bridged by the global-sections identification pullbackTilde_gammaBridge; Sigma-pair section identity is unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app. QuotScheme sorries 10 -> 9; blueprint node lem:pullback_tildeIso proof leanok + new nodes lem:tilde_gamma_adjunction_mathlib, lem:pullbackTilde_gammaBridge

baseMap coherence substrate N1-N4 landed axiom-clean: naturality (adjunction-unit), pullbackComp compatibility (unit_conjugateEquiv + conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv), pullbackCongr transport (subst+rfl), and the step3 Sigma-pair upgrade (pullback_of_openImmersion_iso_restrict inverse characterized as the canonical baseMap via unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app for restrictAdjunction vs pullbackPushforwardAdjunction). All six stages of the Beck-Chevalley intertwining at _sectionLinearEquiv now have proved substrate

Beck-Chevalley intertwining CLOSED: pullback_app_isoTensor_baseMap_sectionLinearEquiv proved axiom-clean via the 6-stage chain (step2 Sigma-inverse, N1 naturality + step1 Sigma-identity, N2 pullbackComp twice, N3 pullbackCongr, N4 step3-inversion). The affine-open section formula Gamma(g^*N, U) = Gamma(Y,U) tensor Gamma(N,V) and its IsBaseChange packaging are now sorry-free; QuotScheme sorries 9 -> 8 (remaining: 5 headline + 3 flatness-gated canonicalBaseChangeMap-isIso). Blueprint: N1-N4 nodes leanok with corrected lean-pointers, stage section updated
Blueprint: fix malformed lem:pullback_tildeIso header (Stacks 01HQ node)

FlatteningStratification: repair 3 false statements (genericFlatness +QuasiCompact, flatLocusStratification flat-over-stratum, universal property bundled with existence via coproduct factorization); prove flatteningStratification + flatLocusAssembly from flatLocusReduction; land the full generic-freeness dévissage layer (GenericallyFree, splicing via free_shortExact, localization transport, torsion base case, prime-filtration assembly genericFlatnessAlgebraic) with the Noether-normalisation domain core as the single new typed sorry

Blueprint FlatteningStratification: sync repaired statements (generic flatness quasi-compactness with counterexample, universal property bundled with existence via stratum coproduct); add the generic-freeness dévissage subsection (GenericallyFree, transport, splicing, torsion base case, finite-module cases, normalisation core with full Nitsure proof) re-pinning thm:generic_flatness_algebraic from TODO to the real Lean assembly; honest proof environments for the Lean-helper nodes

Blueprint QuotScheme: ground the 12 dangling union-merge/section-localization labels in real sorry-free Lean decls (gap1 isIso_fromTildeGamma_of_isQuasicoherent, gap2 basicOpen localization, descent chain, powers transport, annihilator localization, over-restrict equivalence), each axiom-verified with complete proofs and Stacks 01I8 sources; closes the I-0087 dangling-cref set
FlatteningStratification: fix stale ofCurve docstring (corollary is proved, not a sorry)

Prove finite generation of affine sections of a finitely presented module sheaf (Stacks 01PC, finite-type half): for F of finite presentation and V an affine open inside a presenting-cover member, Γ(F,V) is a finite Γ(X,V)-module. The generating sections of the slice F|_{X_i} geometrize across the slice equivalence, pull back to Spec Γ(X,V) along the factorization of fromSpec, land on tilde Γ(F,V) by the 01I8 identification, and a finite generating epimorphism onto a tilde forces finite generation of the module because the tilde–Γ counit at a tilde is invertible and tilde is faithful (module_finite_of_tilde_genSections, module_finite_sections_of_quasicoherentData, exists_affine_finite_sections_nhds in Picard/QuotScheme.lean). Chart supply for Nitsure §4 generic flatness.

Prove geometric generic flatness (Nitsure §4): over an integral locally noetherian base S, a finitely presented module sheaf on a finite-type X → S has flat sections over all affine pairs below a non-empty V = D(f). New file Picard/GenericFlatnessGeometric.lean: the mixed-base stability lemma Module.Flat.of_isLocalizedModule_algebra (flatness over the base survives localizing at a fibre-algebra submonoid — axiom-clean, closes a Mathlib gap), the chart-basic core (chart freeness at g localizes to any basic open above D(g), via the qcqs section-localization engine and base-ring descent), and the two-layer basic-open reduction via Module.flat_of_isLocalized_span plus two flat_iff_of_isLocalization exchanges. genericFlatness's own proof is complete and kernel-checked; it is conditional (sorryAx) only through genericFlatnessAlgebraic, whose r3 induction proof (session 0027, ended at rate limit, integrated unverified) fails the batch kernel build at three localized-module instance walls and is honestly re-opened as a documented typed sorry (r3 text preserved in ledger 6c30537; its sub-lemma layer survives kernel-checked). FlatteningStratification.lean stays Mathlib-only-imports so its heavy dévissage proofs keep their instance environment.

Blueprint: geometric-glue chapter for generic flatness and the affine finite-sections cluster. Picard_FlatteningStratification.tex gains six glue nodes (mixed-base flatness stability, two appLE restriction compatibilities, section-flatness transport, chart-basic core, two-layer basic-open reduction — all \leanok with complete proofs) and thm:generic_flatness gets its real proof (chart supply + per-chart generic freeness + product denominator + the reduction), statement-\leanok only since its cone runs through the re-opened algebraic core; also fixes the malformed theorem header. Picard_QuotScheme.tex gains the Stacks 01PC finite-type cluster (finite generation from a finite generating family of a tilde via the tilde–Γ adjunction; the chart form over a presenting cover member; the affine-neighbourhood chart supply), all \leanok.
Blueprint: fix garbled counit-factorization clause in module_finite_of_tilde_genSections proof (Stacks 01PC node); the adjunction transpose satisfies $\widetilde t \mathbin{;} \varepsilon = \pi'$
Ground reconcile (run 0010 T12 r4): genericFlatness advance verified.

T12 generic freeness domain core CLOSED: the Noether-normalisation strong induction (genericallyFree_quotient_prime_of_fibre_dim_le) kernel-checks — the r3 localized-module walls are defused by extracting the generic-rank exact sequence 0 → D^r → M → T → 0 (T killed by one d ≠ 0) into the clean-context lemma exists_generic_rank_comparison; genericFlatnessAlgebraic (Stacks 051R) and the geometric genericFlatness (Nitsure §4) are now axiom-clean [propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]. Blueprint: new node lem:generic_rank_comparison, proof-\leanok flips for the domain core and both generic-flatness theorems.

T12 statement repair: the finite-strata flattening statements (flatLocusReduction, flatLocusAssembly, flatteningStratification, _universal, .ofCurve) require a NOETHERIAN base, not merely locally noetherian — with only local noetherianity the finite family is impossible (on ⊔ₙ 𝔸ⁿ with the nested-flag sheaf ⊕_{k≤n} O_{V_k}, component n forces ≥ n+1 strata). Lean hypotheses strengthened to IsNoetherian, blueprint bodies aligned with Nitsure's wording, counterexample recorded in docstring + blueprint remark. The ℕ-indexed n=0 case stays locally noetherian (fibre rank is the global index).
Flatness under pushout base change (Stacks 00HI module form): B⊗[A]M is S⊗[R]M for a ring pushout, via of_lift_unique; Module.Flat.of_isPushout

Affine pieces of fibre-product squares: affinity, section-ring pushout (via Mathlib pushoutSection), per-piece flatness/finiteness transfer via Lane F section formula; de-privatize pullback_app_isoTensor_baseMap{,_sectionLinearEquiv}
genericFlatness refactor: quasi-coherent core genericFlatness_of_finite_sections (chart supply as hypothesis), 01PC wrapper unchanged statement
Flatness over the base is affine-local (Stacks 00HT style): chart flatness on an affine cover implies all affine pairs, via two-layer basic-open reduction
Reduced vanishing-ideal subschemes (radical ideal sheaf, reduced affine pieces, integral when irreducible) + CoherentSheafFlat transport along sheaf isos
Flat stratum over an irreducible component: generic flatness on the reduced component transfers to every substratum via pasted pullback squares, piece charts, and affine-locality

flatLocusReduction (Nitsure Lemma 6) PROVED: Noetherian wf-induction on closed strata, flat strata over reduced irreducible components; flatteningStratification now sorry-free axiom-clean; geometric sections moved to GenericFlatnessGeometric (import direction)

Blueprint: five transfer-lemma nodes (pushout flatness 00HI, affine piece, affine-locality, integral reduced subscheme, flat stratum), complete Lemma-6 proof with leanok, assembly leanok, formalization status

Prove the n=0 flat-locus stratification: for S noetherian and F coherent, an N-indexed disjoint family of locally-closed immersions covering |S| with F flat over each stratum, derived from the flattening-stratification existence theorem at pi = id_S. New transport API: CoherentSheafFlat absorbs an isomorphism on the base leg (coherentSheafFlat_of_comp_isIso, via flatness along a bijective change of the acting ring, Flat.trans with a free rank-one tower); strata realized as pullback schemes along id with pullback.fst as immersion, empty-scheme padding for the tail indices. Repair the universal-property statement to Nitsure's actual n=0 special case (flatLocusStratification_universal, entry-ideal strata): the former proper-pi generality is not in the cited source (Nitsure proves part (ii) for P^n_S) and reduced strata provably cannot witness it (Spec k[eps] forces canonical non-reduced stratum structure). Blueprint nodes updated accordingly; flatLocusStratification hypothesis noetherian (matching Nitsure Par.4), lem proof leanok.
